summary: Pipeline Page Redesign V3 (Hero + CRM Kanban) - All 12 requested features verified successfully. The redesigned My Schools page now matches the mockup with dark hero card, teal accent bar, progress rail, badges row, advice box, CTA button, Actions Carousel, Upcoming Events, and CRM-style Kanban board with thin colored bars.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelinePage.js ~557 lines - well-structured with clear component separation
Hero card properly implements dark gradient background with teal accent bar (3px linear-gradient)
Progress rail shows 6 stages with active state highlighting
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Kanban columns use thin colored bars (3px) matching CRM style
Status dots correctly color-coded: green=good, red=overdue, amber=waiting
CSS variables used throughout for proper theme compatibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page V3 redesign complete. Stanford is hero focus (most urgent - Overdue 2d). Kanban: Added(9), Outreach(2), Talking(1), Visit(0), Offer(0), Committed(0). Emma Chen test user has 12 programs total. Upcoming Events shows 3 events.
